text.title: communications-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for communications-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Too many meetings — death by calendar.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Beyond 10% of calendar dedicated to recurring meetings, delivery capacity shrinks faster than coordination benefit grows. Audit frequency every quarter.

failure-mode.description: No agenda for a recurring meeting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Meetings without agendas wander; participants come unprepared; decisions degrade to re-litigated debates. Require a committed agenda 24h before or auto-cancel the meeting.

failure-mode.description: Status report colour set by PM narrative rather than metrics.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Optimism bias systematically delays RED status until a crisis; quantitative thresholds set before the project starts remove the subjective layer.

failure-mode.description: Same communication format for every stakeholder.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A steering committee needs a 1-page decision brief; the dev team needs a ticket list; sending both groups the same status report wastes executive attention and under-informs engineers.
